description_long: This control cabinet features a rectangular, floor-standing structure with a smooth, white exterior and a large, light wood panel mounted on its back. The front face includes three main compartments: two closed sections on either side and a central open section with a visible wooden interior shelf. The top surface is flat and extends the full width of the cabinet, providing a stable support area. The wood panel at the back displays a detailed periodic table, suggesting use in educational or laboratory environments. The cabinet stands on small, dark feet, slightly elevating it from the ground, and the overall design is modern and functional.
description: A modern, white floor-standing control cabinet with a large wood-backed periodic table and multiple compartments, including an open central shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing three compartments, including an open central shelf and a large periodic table panel mounted at the back.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the thin profile of the wood panel at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full wooden panel with no visible compartments or features on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the wood panel's edge.
